Data.Label: Beginning
Values: 1 BBY, Battle of Scarif (open war begins)

Data.Label: End
Values: 5 ABY, signing of the Galactic Concordance

Data.Label: Outcome
Values: The New Republic is established by the Alliance to Restore the Republic
The Galactic Empire is dissolved and collapses into numerous Imperial Remnants
Parts of the Empire are incorporated into the New Republic
The redemption of Anakin Skywalker and the death of Darth Sidious

Data.Label: Major battles

Links.Content: Assault on the Mako-Ta Space Docks

Values: Assault on the Mako-Ta Space Docks
